claim: YOLO demand router schema readiness converts evidence agent missing and clarify recommendations into blockers via evidenceResultBlockingIssues, preventing prd_ready true when unresolved missing data or clarification requests exist.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues converts missing[], recommendation in ['clarify','blocked','block'], verdict in ['blocked','block','fail'], status in ['blocked','failed','error'] into blockers with codes EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED, EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED
evidence.why: Core implementation showing how missing and clarify recommendations become blockers

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each evidence result and pushes blockers to blockerList, returns prd_ready: blockers.length === 0
evidence.why: Integration of evidence blocking logic into PRD readiness calculation

evidence.summary: actionableMissingItems filters out non-missing status items, sanitizeMissing applies isNonMissingStatusItem patterns to exclude 'no missing data identified' style notes
evidence.why: Shows how the system distinguishes actionable missing items from status notes

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' verifies missing array and recommendation=clarify produce EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers, prd_ready=false
evidence.why: Test evidence demonstrating the blocking behavior for missing and clarify cases

evidence.summary: Recent dispatch shows EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blockers for explorer, cross-checker, verifier with messages listing unresolved missing evidence, prd_ready=false
evidence.why: Runtime evidence showing the system is actively converting missing items to blockers

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness requires evidence_results for all roles in requiredEvidenceRoles, adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blocker if any role result is not complete
evidence.why: Shows evidence completion requirement before PRD readiness

evidence.summary: inspectEvidenceAgreement adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blockers when recommendations disagree (block+proceed or proceed+clarify)
evidence.why: Additional blocker mechanism for evidence agent conflicts

assumptions: Evidence agents populate missing array only with truly unresolved items, not status notes
recommendation field values are normalized and case-insensitive in the blocking logic
Evidence result completion check (evidenceResultComplete) validates both completed flag and evidence presence
risks: If evidence agents put status notes in missing array, false-positive blockers may occur
If recommendation values have typos or non-standard casing, blocking logic may not catch them
If evidence results have completed=true but missing evidence, blockers may be missed
missing: evidence[0] must declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown.
evidence[1] must declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown.
evidence[2] must declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown.
evidence[3] must declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown.
evidence[4] must declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown.

result.notes: Code, tests, and runtime artifacts confirm that evidenceResultBlockingIssues converts missing arrays and clarify/block recommendations into blockers that prevent prd_ready=true. The implementation handles missing[], recommendation in ['clarify','blocked','block'], verdict in ['blocked','block','fail'], and status in ['blocked','failed','error'] cases. Test coverage specifically verifies missing+clarify blocking behavior. Recent dispatch artifacts show the system is actively working as designed.
